settings.tagline: The piece you'll reach for every morning.
settings.description: A refined essential. Crafted in 14k gold vermeil over sterling silver with a satin finish that only improves with wear. The proportions are deliberate — substantial enough to notice, light enough to forget you're wearing it.
settings.materials: 14k gold vermeil — 2.5 microns over sterling silver. Nickel-free. Available in 16" and 18" lengths.
